title: 最優秀ジュニアウマ娘選出！

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
One day, I receive a phone call from Reporter
Otonashi.

text_block_list.name: Reporter Otonashi
text_block_list.text:
"I'm sorry for the abrupt call, but there's
something I need to tell you right away!"

text_block_list.name: Reporter Otonashi
text_block_list.text:
"<chrname>'s efforts this year have
been recognized..."

text_block_list.name: Reporter Otonashi
text_block_list.text:
"And she's been selected as the Best Junior Year
Umamusume!"

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Otonashi continues, offering me warm words of
praise.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I hang up the phone and bask in feelings of joy,
motivated to work even harder with my partner.
Then, all of a sudden...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I'm visited by Trainer Kiryuin and her gentle
partner, Happy Meek.

text_block_list.name: Trainer Kiryuin
text_block_list.text:
Sorry to disturb you, Trainer
<username>, but I just heard
about your award!

text_block_list.name: Trainer Kiryuin
text_block_list.text:
Congratulations! Your accomplishments this year
have been truly remarkable!

text_block_list.name: Trainer Kiryuin
text_block_list.text:
I felt emotional finding out that a runner trained
by my colleague earned the award!

text_block_list.name: Trainer Kiryuin
text_block_list.text: I just had to come by and congratulate you!

text_block_list.name: Trainer Kiryuin
text_block_list.text:
And now, I'm motivated to make sure it's me who
comes out on top next year!

text_block_list.name: Trainer Kiryuin
text_block_list.text:
Let's keep doing our best as fellow trainers and
rivals!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Later, <chrname> and I vow to work
hard and be the best next year, too.
